name: Mugiro-Lekunberri and Ixkier Waterfall via the Plazaola Greenway
name_original: Mugiro-Lekunberri y Cascada de Ixkier por la Vía Verde del Plazaola
region_intro: Hiking around Lekunberri offers access to the Sierra de Aralar mountain range, characterized by verdant landscapes, meadows, and forests of beech and oak. The region features diverse terrain, including the Larraun river valley and the Sakana corridor. Trails often provide panoramic views over the Araxes valley and the Malloas. The area is also home to the Plazaola Greenway, a former railway line now used for walking and cycling. Best hiking trails around Lekunberri The most popular hiking route is Mugiro-Lekunberri and Ixkier Waterfall via the Plazaola Greenway, a 5.8 miles (9.3 km) trail that takes 2 hours 28 minutes to complete. This moderate route follows the historic Plazaola Greenway and passes the Ixkier Waterfall. Another top favourite among local hikers is Sources of the Iribas River – Iribas loop from Lekunberri, a moderate 9.5 miles (15.3 km) path. This loop explores the natural sources of the Iribas River, offering varied scenery. Local hikers also love the Cantina del Plazaola – Lekunberri loop from Lekunberri, a 10.0 miles (16.1 km) trail leading through the landscape connected to the Plazaola Greenway, often completed in about 4 hours 33 minutes. Hiking around Lekunberri is defined by mountain ranges like Sierra de Aralar, river valleys, and extensive beech and oak forests. The network offers options for easy, moderate, and difficult routes, catering to various ability levels. The routes in Lekunberri are highly rated by the komoot community with an average score of 4.5 stars from more than 200 reviews. More than 1500 hikers have used komoot to explore Lekunberri's varied terrain.
region_faq:
Q: How many hiking trails are available around Lekunberri?
A: Lekunberri offers a wide selection of routes, with over 100 hiking trails to explore. These range from easy walks to more challenging treks, catering to various fitness levels.

Q: Are there easy hiking trails suitable for beginners or families in Lekunberri?
A: Yes, Lekunberri has several easy trails perfect for beginners and families. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e970112562/mugiro-lekunberri-and-ixkier-waterfall-via-the-plazaola-greenway" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Mugiro-Lekunberri and Ixkier Waterfall via the Plazaola Greenway&lt;/a&gt; is a moderate route that follows the accessible Plazaola Greenway, offering a gentle experience. Another easy option is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/15003004" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Ixkier Waterfall – Millstones of Ixkier loop from Lekunberri&lt;/a&gt;, which is shorter and features the picturesque waterfall.

Q: Can I find circular hiking routes around Lekunberri?
A: Absolutely. Many trails in Lekunberri are designed as loops. For example, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/10522991" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Sources of the Iribas River – Iribas loop from Lekunberri&lt;/a&gt; explores natural springs, while the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/15003841" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Cantina del Plazaola – Lekunberri loop from Lekunberri&lt;/a&gt; offers a scenic journey connected to the Plazaola Greenway.

Q: What natural attractions or landmarks can I see while hiking in Lekunberri?
A: Lekunberri's trails lead to various natural and historical sights. You can visit the beautiful &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/4107585" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Ixkier Waterfall&lt;/a&gt;, explore the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/4207385" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Sources of the Iribas River&lt;/a&gt;, or enjoy panoramic views from the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/4737099" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Vultures' Viewpoint&lt;/a&gt;. The region also features the historic Plazaola Greenway and the impressive Sierra de Aralar mountain range.

Q: Are there any trails that lead to viewpoints with scenic vistas?
A: Yes, the Sierra de Aralar mountain range provides numerous opportunities for stunning views. You can find panoramic vistas from the Mirador de la Peña and the Mirador de Azpirotz, offering sweeping views over the Araxes valley and the Malloas. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/15003825" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Sources of the Iribas River – San Miguel de Aralar Sanctuary loop from Lekunberri&lt;/a&gt; also offers rewarding views, including those from the San Miguel de Aralar Sanctuary.

Q: What is the best time of year to go hiking in Lekunberri?
A: Lekunberri offers beautiful hiking experiences throughout the year. The Sierra de Aralar's verdant landscapes, meadows, and forests are particularly stunning in spring and autumn with vibrant colors. Summer provides pleasant conditions for higher altitude trails, while winter can offer unique snowy landscapes, though some routes may require more preparation.

Q: Are there any trails that feature historical or cultural sites?
A: Yes, the region is rich in history. The Plazaola Greenway itself is a historic route following an old railway line. Additionally, the Dolmens Hiking Trail features 44 dolmens and a menhir, offering a journey through ancient history amidst beech forests. The San Miguel de Aralar Sanctuary, a 12th-century Romanesque site, is also a rewarding hiking destination within the Aralar mountains.

Q: What do other hikers say about the trails in Lekunberri?
A: The trails in Lekunberri are highly regarded by the komoot community, with an average rating of 4.5 stars from over 200 reviews. Hikers often praise the diverse terrain, the well-maintained paths, and the stunning natural beauty of the Sierra de Aralar and the Plazaola Greenway.

Q: Are there any trails that pass by waterfalls?
A: Yes, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e970112562/mugiro-lekunberri-and-ixkier-waterfall-via-the-plazaola-greenway" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Mugiro-Lekunberri and Ixkier Waterfall via the Plazaola Greenway&lt;/a&gt; route directly passes by the picturesque &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/4107585" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Ixkier Waterfall&lt;/a&gt;. This waterfall is a notable feature along the historic Greenway.

Q: Are there options for longer, more challenging hikes in the area?
A: For experienced hikers seeking a challenge, Lekunberri offers more difficult routes. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/15003825" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Sources of the Iribas River – San Miguel de Aralar Sanctuary loop from Lekunberri&lt;/a&gt; is a demanding 24.3 km (15.1 mi) trail with significant elevation gain, leading to the San Miguel de Aralar Sanctuary and offering extensive mountain views.

Q: Is Lekunberri accessible by public transport for hikers?
A: Lekunberri's location between Pamplona and San Sebastián makes it relatively accessible. While specific public transport details for trailheads vary, the town itself serves as a good base for exploring the region's trails, including those along the Plazaola Greenway which is well-connected.

Q: Are there any adventure activities near the hiking trails?
A: Beyond hiking, the area offers other outdoor activities. The Beigorri Adventure Park, located within the Aritzalde oak grove, provides tree-top challenges, zip lines, and balance games for those looking for a different kind of outdoor adventure.
tips: Bridge with a lot of charm, beautifully made.

With a route of almost 60 km in length and 15 km more in adaptation, the Vía Verde del Plazaola runs along the old railway line that linked San Sebastián and Pamplona. Today it is a picturesque itinerary for hiking and cycling with very colorful landscapes and for the most part following the course of the Larraun Ibaia river.
Nice waterfall on the bed of the Larraun Ibaia river. It is one of the attractions on the itinerary of the Vía Verde de Plazaola, a very picturesque route that you cannot miss.
